name: patra
description: Patra 项目专属能力 plugin：15 个 skills（brainstorming / writing-plans / executing-plans / subagent-driven-development / dispatching-parallel-agents / test-driven-development / systematic-debugging / verification-before-completion / requesting-code-review / receiving-code-review / finishing-a-development-branch / using-git-worktrees / using-superpowers / release-planning / create-issue），基于 jnMetaCode/superpowers-zh fork 精简并按 patra-api 六边形架构 + Java/Gradle 技术栈深度定制。
